title: What I think about Rei in a nutshell
display_title: What I think about Rei in a nutshell
wikitext:
[]: What I think about Rei in a nutshell.             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Aug 02, 2006 6:54 pm Second impact occurs. Gendo's like, "OMG KILL THE ANGELS THEY KILLED OUR PEOPLE" and NERV/GERKIN is made and Gendo later takes control and hires Naoko. Naoko gets attracted to Gendo. Rei tells Naoko what Gendo really thinks. Naoko's like, "OMG THAT'S A LIE N00B" and kills Rei I. Rei gets like, cloned, and therefore, doesn't have her own free will, which is why she is quiet and is like, a maid. I also don't understand about how people think Rei could be another Yui. Like, how would it had happened?

[]:             Quote Post by narcosis219 » Wed Aug 02, 2006 7:00 pm HOMG! t@|-|t$ 1i3k $0 @\/\/$|\/|!!!11!1!11!!1 anyway, i dont get how shes so silent and mellow even if she is a clone, because if you were cloned, everything about you would be the same as the person you were cloned from, and yui didnt seem like the quiet type.

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Wed Aug 02, 2006 7:03 pm She isn't a clone in the traditional sense. After Yui was absorbed in Shogouki, Gendo and friends tried to get her back. Since Shogouki was attached to Lillith at the time, somehow (whether accidental or not) the DNA of Lillith merged with the flesh and soul of Lillith. This=Rei. So, since the contact experiment had just happened, some of her DNA could be recovered.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Wed Aug 02, 2006 7:06 pm It's not that she would've been like that naturally, just the way she was raised. Also, it's not like even if she was cloned from yui, that she would have her personality. I've been told that she has her own soul (Hey, this is from evaotaku, don't accuse me), although only one clone can have it at a time.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Sat Aug 05, 2006 10:07 pm Hmmm....what can one say about Rei? She's a mindless zombie, albeit an attractive mindless zombie, but one nonetheless. She's sort of evil in a way. Also, she may be a bit insane. She sort of scares me actually > . >

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 11:06 am Kaworu Nagisa wrote: Hmmm....what can one say about Rei? She's a mindless zombie, albeit an attractive mindless zombie, but one nonetheless. She's sort of evil in a way. Also, she may be a bit insane. She sort of scares me actually > . >

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Tue Aug 08, 2006 10:30 pm My own opinion of Rei is that she was severly restricted and experienced little human contact. Unlike normal children, she was not introduced to children her own age, and thus had no idea how to handle social situations (ex: Rei's confusion about Shinji's emotions after the Ramiel fight.) Plus, in ep 23, we see Rei's quarters as being extremely isolated. Because she had little social skills as a little kid, she was severly ill equipped to deal with others later in life. In this case, I believe it was nurture over nature. To further prove that Rei is made of Lillith's marshmellowy goodness, when her AT field begins to fail, instead of reverting to LCL, her arms falls off, similar to how GNR falls apart after Instrumentality. My questions: WHY did her AT field begin to fail, and what made ehr regain it?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Aug 09, 2006 8:24 am Her will, perhaps? Maybe she put together those well-known words there and then. I wouldn't be surprised if she had improvised the whole thing.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Wed Aug 09, 2006 1:08 pm In a nutshell: Rei is cool, cold and attractive.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Wed Aug 09, 2006 1:16 pm Rei loosing her arm was ridiculous (all the better made by the commentary of her VA saying "Hey Rei, lend me a hand!") I was so glad that she PWNED Gendo in the end.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Fri Aug 11, 2006 8:55 am she lost her arm b/c gendo told her to release her ATF, and we know what happens... then she decided to do what she wants, so she put it up again (taking Adam) and merging with Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Aug 13, 2006 3:13 pm the reason shes quiet...... Its probly cuz she feels taht she is disposable......the reason she seems to ccare about Gendo and is so dedicated is cuz thats the only time she has any usefullness.... Its gotta be tough knowing that if you die theres a couple hundered of you in tank underground to replace you..... Also......Rei is half angel and half Yui.....thats why she can pilot Unit 00 despite Naoko's soul being inside it.... BTW...Naoko is the one who lcoked Yui in Unit 01....no accident.... i always figured they just took some Lilith DNA, and some hair from one Yui's old hairbrushes after she vanished to make Rei... We of course all know that the angel half of Rei is made of Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Aug 13, 2006 3:26 pm I think that Rei is a lot more than half lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 15, 2006 12:11 am Timstuff wrote: I think that Rei is a lot more than half lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Aug 15, 2006 12:30 am If she's half Yui then that opens up the whole "incest" can of worms in regards to the feelings between her and Shinji. I think she probably has minimal Yui genes (if any), being mostly Lilith and customized human genetics. She may have just enough of Yui's genetics to look like her and have someof her traits, (which would no doubt be intentional on Gendo's part) but I don't think it goes much further than what's on the surface. BTW, I'm and AxS shipper, so it's not like I've got much to loose if I'm wrong. But I'm just really tired of the idea that Rei is Shinji's sister, even though we don't even know if she has any of Yui's genetic information at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Aug 15, 2006 5:07 am @Timstuff Genetics is one thing. Personality is another. Physically she resembles Yui, but she is the total opposite of her. She is cold closed-up as an iceberg, while Yui is a lovely woman who does her best to help others. Like the Moon and the Sun. Both are big things in the sky, but this is where similarities end. You're right. Ayanami and Shinji can't be sister and brother. Only half-sister/-brother. :P And I'm also thinking about just how could they be a pair, since Ayanami is everything but on the list. (Not on Shinji's, but the first on mine :P) I've been wondering: what would have happened, if Shinji and Misato meet after 3I (anyhow)?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Aug 15, 2006 10:52 am Misato would probably give Shinji a big hug, and probably Asuka as well. Then, maybe she'd continue on as their guardian.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Aug 15, 2006 2:34 pm Timstuff wrote: Misato would probably give Shinji a big hug, and probably Asuka as well. Then, maybe she'd continue on as their guardian.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 15, 2006 4:05 pm Yeah - even psycho-Shinji-III would probably wimp out of asking Misato to pony up on her end of the deal.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 21, 2006 9:16 pm Spoilers throughout? I personally like Rei, though I am more partial to Asuka. It's interesting how throughout the series, she learns what emotion is, and in the end decides to not be a doll anymore to help save the world. (Seriously, if it weren't for Ayanami, Yui, and Kaworu-kun talking some sense into Shinji, we'd be fucked.) The embodiement (?) of hope is truely beautiful. Since this is a topic about Rei, I was wondering: ~Did Gendou plan for Naoko to kill Rei 1 and herself? It seems like he set Naoko up, but I'm not sure. ~Who ARE the ghosts that appear of her when everyone dies and turns into LCL? Do they have something to do with mystery Rei? ~Who IS mystery Rei, anyway? Any thoughts? (I'll probably start a topic about this at some point) Finally, how IS she so popular when she barely has any speaking parts? Is it her "mysterious" background and good looks that people like? I can see how Asuka is popular because of her kinda genki attitude and ass-kicking ablitlies, and Misato because she cares for the Eva Pilots, but I'm not sure in terms of Rei. ^^; (Rei herself, speaking at Mitsuishi Kotono fast-speed: "...It's because of your personality always rank so low on the popularity polls! I'll teach you good looks can't get you everywhere, with some physcial education! *slap slap slap slap slap* Anta baka. Anta baka. Un, anta baka ne. Ah, I feel better." See/listen to Evangelion: After the End ! It's awesome! ) I've been wondering: what would have happened, if Shinji and Misato meet after 3I (anyhow)?
summary: []: What I think about Rei in a nutshell.             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Aug 02, 2006 6:54 pm Second impact occurs.
